Meta.title: SABMER — Elevator Installation
Meta.description: Professional elevator installation subcontracting: installation, modernization and handover support. Certified crews, experience with equipment from leading manufacturers.

Hero.sub: We install, modernize and hand over elevator equipment for general contractors and manufacturers. On time and up to standard.

About.title: About the company
About.text: SABMER is an elevator installation subcontractor. We work alongside manufacturers and general contractors: providing certified crews, keeping schedules and taking responsibility for installation quality at every stage.

cards.c1d: Complete installation of machine-room and machine-room-less elevators.
cards.c2d: Equipment replacement and upgrades of existing elevators.
cards.c3d: Adjustment, testing and support through final acceptance.
cards.c4d: Experience with equipment from leading manufacturers.
cards.c5d: Installers with valid certifications and licenses.
cards.c6d: Precise project planning and regular reporting.

Founders.title: Founders
Founders.amirBio: Over 15 years in the elevator industry. Responsible for client relations, contracts and company growth. Built partnerships with leading elevator equipment manufacturers.
Founders.vovaBio: Mechanical engineer who worked his way up from installer to project manager. Responsible for installation methods, crew training and on-site quality control.

Careers.title: Careers
Careers.intro: We are growing and looking for people who want to build elevators the right way. What we offer:
